title: AsPEN founded
body: Established in April 2012 as a Special Interest Group within ISPE.

title: Methodology paper published
body: Andersen M, Bergman U, Choi NK, et al. Pharmacoepidemiol Drug Saf. 2013. PMID: 23653370.

title: First multi-country PSSA study
body: Antipsychotics and acute hyperglycaemia — a rapid adverse drug event assessment across AsPEN sites. PMID: 23696036.

title: SCAN project & ongoing studies
body: Surveillance of Health Care in Asian Network (SCAN); continuing PSSA studies on thiazolidinediones × CVD and other drug-outcome pairs.
